title: × dactylanthera somersetensis
intro: × Dactylanthera somersetensis, also known as the Somerset Dactylanthera, is a rare hybrid species of orchid native to the UK, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Coeloglossum viride. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the Somerset Dactylanthera are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the roots or leaves, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
